title: Type Certificate
brief: One locked brain, no edits. Certify it flies the mission on a second and third airframe with envelopes and approval timing it never saw before.
teaches: Portability is the whole point of the interface: a brain that reads the body's advertised profile (MaxAltitude / MaxAirspeed / MinAirspeed) instead of hardcoding the Mule's numbers ports unchanged to the Heron and Ferret, while one that baked in a body's values would be rejected. Commanded values sit inside every body's common envelope; the handshake absorbs each body's approval latency. Score is the worst of the three runs.

objective._doc: Same reach-hold mission run on every body in `bodies`. The locked brain must win on all three; the level score is the worst-of-three (aggregateWorst).
